REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1344 Alabama Street, San Francisco)
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Debra Fox appearing for petitioner. Terms of sale stated by counsel. Bid is increased to $919,250.00. Proceeds of sale to be deposit into blocked account. Status on filing of blocked account receipt is set on 6/25. Counsel will submit order.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-04-2007 Continued To May-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For An Order Granting Succcessor Trustee The Authority (1) To Sell The Trust Property Located At 1344 Alabama Street, San Francisco, California And (2) To Enter Into An Exclusive Right To Sell Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Debra Fox appearing for petitioner. Court is concern that the conservatee's wife did not get notice. Counsel stated that the wife has no interest in the trust. She assured the Court that it is his separate property. Matter granted. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Order Bringing Trust Under Cont Ct Su
Off Calendar Feb-23-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello (Counsel for Petitioner Eleanor Calderon), Eleanor Calderon (Petitioner), Franchesca Callejo (Counsel for the Conservatee). The appearance of Miguel Lopez, the conservatee (and Trustee), was excused.

In addition to granting the Petition, the Court further authorized the inclusion of Mr. Lopez's pension payments to the Trust, and the procural of a reverse mortgage by the Conservator/Successor Trustee, and noted the resignation of Miguel Lopez as the Trustee.

Bond is set at $60,000.

Judge: John Dearman, Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR 11722, Court Investigator: Jeanine Lim, Bailiff: None, Clerk: R. Michael Diles.
